situation: audit-2026-07-06-021 H-004 finding: audio_relay.py:222 binds 0.0.0.0 with no authentication, accepting PCM from any network peer. ESP32 is local device; default should be loopback + optional token gate for cross-segment deployments.
action: Changed default bind from 0.0.0.0 to 127.0.0.1. Added --host CLI arg + PA_RELAY_HOST env override. Added optional AUTH token gate in handler(): when self.token configured, first text message must be 'AUTH <token>' or connection closed. Backward compatible (no token = original behavior). Single file, route-fix via opt-worktree.sh.
